title: rubus moluccanus var. fallax
intro: Rubus moluccanus var. fallax, also known as the Moluccan black raspberry or the Himalayan black raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus moluccanus plant species, which is a type of raspberry native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus moluccanus var. fallax include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus moluccanus var. fallax can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and creams for topical application.
